name: Philly Cheese Steak Wraps
recipeIngredient: 2 cups thin sliced onion, cut into half rings
1 ½ cups red pepper strips, cut into ¼-inch pieces
1 ½ cups green pepper strips, cut into ¼-inch pieces
6 ounces deli roast beef, thinly sliced, cut into ½-inch strips
recipeInstructions:
1. In a 10-inch skillet, melt the butter until sizzling. Add onions and peppers. Cook over medium-high heat, stirring occasionally, until onions are golden (6 to 8 minutes). Remove from heat. Stir in garlic salt, cheese, and beef strips.
2. Place about 1 cup of filling in the center of each warm tortilla. Fold two opposite edges of the tortilla toward the center over the filling. Roll up the open end of the tortilla toward the opposite edge. Place seam-side down on a microwave-safe plate.
3. Microwave two sandwiches on high, turning or rearranging after half the time, until heated through (1 to 2 minutes). Repeat with remaining sandwiches. Makes 6 sandwiches. Each sandwich: 470 calories; 25g fat.
